title: Everbuild 506 Universal Contractors PVA, 5 kg & EuroScrim Self Adhesive Scrim Tape, White, 48 mm x 90 m
features: Product 1: Multi-purpose agent, primer sealer, cement filler and plaster admixture that adheres to most common building and D.I.Y. materials except PVC and rubber
Product 1: Ideal for priming unsound surfaces prior to plastering or painting, as an adhesive on wood, cork, textiles and most applications where at least one surface is porous
Product 1: Can be used for general dust sealing on flaking paintwork, walls or other surfaces
Product 1: Ideal for use as a cement admixture to improve flexibility of mortars and screeds
Product 2: Premium quality, quick and easy to apply, self-adhesive scrim tape that eliminates the need for pre-plastering
Product 2: Features high quality tack adhesive and an open mesh that will not blister or bubble, creating perfect joints everytime
Product 2: For use on drywalls, plaster walls and ceilings
Product 2: Available in widths of 48mm and 100mm
description: From the manufacturer Everbuild – A Sika Company The UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. Everbuild are proud to be home to the trade’s most respected products which have been enhanced over the years by class-leading research and facilities. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
